market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

analysis.rewritten_desc: Escape to this stylish, 4-guest apartment where the £128 nightly rate offers exceptional value in a walkable beach locale. Just 10 minutes from the shore, it's perfect for travelers seeking a peaceful base without compromising on cost. While the open layout and private access are already featured, potential upgrades could include outdoor space or parking facilities to further enhance appeal. With a 4.65 guest rating, this is a proven value spot for those prioritizing both comfort and budget-friendly stays.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Prioritize a living room shot showcasing natural light and views over a standard exterior photo as the cover image. This room type best communicates the property's ambiance and spatial quality.
key_diagnosis: Nightly rate (-27% vs £175 median cohort rate) isn't translating to competitive occupancy (15.2% 90-day booked vs 28.3% median)
Title fails to lead with price differential or highlight Superhost differentiation despite 4.65 rating
Description lacks specific amenities that could justify the market discount and meet guest expectations
analysis.outreach_hook: Your £128 rate is -27% vs the city median but only achieved 15.2% occupancy over next 90 days — let's identify 3 actionable fixes to close this gap.
